substep.title: Initialize Strike Counter
substep.action: Set {{strike_count}} = 0 in session state. Persists across iterations in this skill only; not carried over to subsequent sessions.

substep.title: Confirm With User
substep.output:
Design skeleton rendered at {{design_path}}.
Status: active. Grounded in research file: {{research_path}}.
Entering brain-surgery conversation. I'll present each of the three sections in turn. Stress-test as we go — your job is to push back on substantive decisions; my job is to defend them or revise them.
